name: Toho Lamac Co., Ltd.
summary: Toho Lamac Co., Ltd. engages in the trading of shoes. The company offers sneakers, synthetic-leather shoes, and sports shoes for men, women, and children. It markets its products under the SHOEZOO, hocco, SONIA PARENTI, &Rouge, Fit Partner, B.C.COMPANY, NICE CLAUP, mc marie claire, apricot, keds, LEON, and ROYAL ALBERT HALL brand names. The company was formerly known as Toho Rubber Industries Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Toho Lamac Co., Ltd. in January 1988. Toho Lamac Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
